data.content:
Implemented \ for installed release binaries using GitHub redirect-based latest asset resolution, checksum verification, archive extraction, and atomic self-replacement. Tightened install.sh target detection to the published release matrix, documented the new update flow, and added unit plus integration coverage for target mapping, redirected-version parsing, --check, no-op, --force, and unsupported targets. Validation completed with \Diff in /Users/cartine/loom/crates/loom-core/src/codegen/knots_bundle.rs:111:
             version: ir.version,
             default_profile: ir.default_profile.clone(),
         },
[31m-        states: ir
[m[31m-            .states
[m[31m-            .values()
[m[31m-            .map(state_bundle)
[m[31m-            .collect(),
[m[32m+        states: ir.states.values().map(state_bundle).collect(),
[m         steps: ir.steps.values().map(step_bundle).collect(),
         phases: ir.phases.values().map(phase_bundle).collect(),
         profiles: ir, \
